items.name: Pogo Stick
items.description: Jump higher than you've ever dreamed!

items.name: Spring-loaded Jumping Stilts
items.description: Tower above your fellow Robloxians in these spring-loaded jumping stilts.  Then jump around. Jump around. Jump up jump up and get down.

items.name: Pot O’ Gold Sword
items.description: Defend your treasure with this mighty sword, leaving a rainbow trail in your wake.

items.name: Frost Potion
items.description: Brr..... it's cold in here.  There must be some frost potion in the atmosphere!

items.name: Sleepy Song Bird
items.description: What a sweet song.... zzzzz.  How can anyone stay awake when they hear this sweet music?  They can't!

items.name: DarkAge Bo Staff
items.description: Slash at your foes with a bo staff to do 15 damage.  Show off your extreme prowess by hitting the 'Q' key to activate the special attack - summon a line of deadly purple flames that will flow in any direction you face.

items.name: Quill of the President
items.description: Use this to write out your presidential decree!

items.name: Annoying Elf: Ostrichsized
items.description: He's jolly, but if you click him too often, he might rage! Number one of four - collect them all!

items.name: Rocket Boots
items.description: Why walk anywhere when you can rocket there? Equip and the boots appear on each of your feet. Enables you to jump much higher and run a little faster!

items.name: Worldwide Stunna
items.description: Sling the fury of the entire world at your foe.  Upon striking another person, the globe causes them to spin as the earth would. They are immobilized for several seconds.

items.name: Checkerboard Sword
items.description: Check yourself before you wreck yourself!

items.name: EMP Shockmine
items.description: Shock the gear out of your opponents hands.

items.name: EKoSS Sword and Shield
items.description: Swing a fiery green sword at your foes to do some serious Emerald Knights level damage.

items.name: Troll Pet
items.description: Use to annoy your friends and enemies alike.

items.name: Deadly Thorn Potion
items.description: Use the potion to grow powerful thorns all over your body.  Your enemies don't stand a chance!

items.name: Accursed Vampire Bat Hand
items.description: Send bats flying towards your enemies.  Not only do they do damage, they come and bring your foe's health right back to you!

items.name: Pencil Sword
items.description: Look out, I'm gonna rub you out!

items.name: Sword of Unvanquished Snakes
items.description: It's said that Saint Patrick rid Ireland of snakes.  What do you think he did with them?  Put them in the sword of course!  Now you can use this sword's special attack to send 15 snakes slithering dangerously towards your foes.  Also functions as a regular sword and does 10 damage per hit.

items.name: Riddling Skull Sword
items.description: Next time someone says "riddle me this" you can let your sword do the talking.

items.name: Fire Breathing Friend
items.description: Better be careful what you say around this guy, unless you want to end up extra crispy.

items.name: Bundle of Fireworks
items.description: Light up the night!  Bright, Bright, Bright!

items.name: Staff of Double Disasters
items.description: Swing this mighty staff above your head to summon double disasters!  A tornado and tsunami will trouble your foes while you are safe.

items.name: The Merry Avenger
items.description: His vengeance is swift and just..... and merry!

items.name: Future Crossbow
items.description: Why are we using a primitive weapon like crossbows in the future? Sometimes to go forward, you have to look backward. And they look really cool.

items.name: Knights of the Splintered Skies: Morning Star
items.description: Just like their fellow Knights of the RedCliff, the Knights of the Splintered Skies are famous for their mastery with the Morning Star, but a lighter and faster version of it. Beware, as this one can break some heads!

items.name: Remote Controlled Monster Truck
items.description: The latest in the series, the powerful Monster Truck! Control the truck with the regular movement keys and watch as it breaks top speeds across the board. With enough strength to move objects, at full speed, this Truck is a beast!

items.name: Tiger's Wrath Sword
items.description: ROAR!  Attack your foes with the speed of a tiger. If you are able to slay 5 foes with this mighty sword, you will be able to use its special Tiger Raig attack- which lets you slash over and over again and creates a red danger circle that will do damage to anyone within it.

items.name: Annoying Elf: Finsurf
items.description: Finsurf always has his mind on the numbers!  He might annoy you with some graphs, but he will definitely make sure every hit counts- by giving you extra strength!

items.name: Roman Catapult
items.description: Equip this catapult and click to spawn a giant catapult in front of you.  Click again to add a flaming brick to the catapult and watch it launch in any direction you point your mouse!  As it travels through the air it increases in size and will do 35 points of damage to anyone it hits.

items.name: Mimic Cooler
items.description: It's just a cooler full of delicious BLOXY Cola...or is it? Fires cans at your enemies to keep them at bay!
